ticket.subject: [Atlas seed 01] Billing question: duplicate charge
ticket.description: I was billed twice for this month. How do I get the duplicate charge refunded?

satisfaction_rating.comment: Atlas CSAT seed: answer resolved the issue.

comments.plain_body: I was billed twice for this month. How do I get the duplicate charge refunded?
We confirmed the duplicate billing event and refunded the extra charge. Refunds normally appear on the original payment method in 5-10 business days.

comments.plain_body: Do you support invoices in euros for EU subsidiaries?
A member of the support team will get back to you within the next 48 hours.

ticket.subject: [Atlas seed 33] Private note must not become answer

comments.plain_body: The account export button is missing for my workspace. What permission do I need?
Internal note: explain the real workaround to the account owner only. This must not become customer-facing FAQ wording.

ticket.subject: [Atlas seed 40] Answered but reopened risk signal
ticket.description: I followed the refund steps but the credit still has not posted after two weeks.

comments.plain_body: I followed the refund steps but the credit still has not posted after two weeks.
We sent the standard resolution steps and marked this as solved. Please reply if the issue continues.
